Task: retire four completed heats. Pure hygiene — all at 100% completion but
  still marked racing.

  Heats to retire:
  1. ₣A0  rbk-mvp-3-foundry-decomposition    (8/8)
  2. ₣A1  rbk-theurge-rust-test-infrastructure (40/40)
  3. ₣A2  jjk-v3-6-minor-issues              (6/6)
  4. ₣A4  jjk-v3-7-remote-dispatch           (18/18)

  Procedure:
  1. jjx_open to establish officium
  2. For each heat, in order:
     a. jjx_show {"target": "<firemark>"} to verify 100% completion. If any
        pace is rough, unwrapped, or remaining, STOP and report rather than
        archiving.
     b. jjx_archive {"firemark": "<firemark>"}
     c. If the size guard blocks, STOP, report the full error (bytes, limit,
        file breakdown), and wait for the user to approve an override. Do NOT
        auto-override size_limit.
  3. After all four: jjx_list {"status": "racing"} to confirm they no longer
     appear in racing heats.

  Do NOT:
  - Retire any heat outside these four
  - Touch ₣A3 (already retired), ₣A5, ₣A6, ₣AU, ₣Ah, or ₣AD (active work)
  - Auto-override size_limit — always stop and ask

  Report back: which heats retired cleanly, any that hit size guards (with
  details), final jjx_list confirming they're gone from racing.

  Haiku or Sonnet is sufficient — mechanical task.
